creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #18)

> Actually, the patch qualified for portmgr blanket as soon as it landed upstream. 

Where is it stated there is blanket approval for any upstream commit? Such a thing would be a free for all.

> Notice comment 11 

Which says OpenCL doesn't work on any version for him?

> comment 4 was invalidated by comment 9 but both are so context-heavy, so let's ignore those.

Not that those appear in any way related...

Anyway, I'm happy to drop this quagmire around a patch if an upstream snapshot is working as D11377 indicates.
